data.title: YouTube, owned by Alphabet, offers U.S. creators option to receive payouts in PayPal's stablecoin, PYUSD.
data.description: Alphabet's YouTube has announced that U.S. creators can now choose to receive their payouts in stablecoins. This new option allows them to receive earnings in PayPal's stablecoin. PayPal Holdings Inc's head of crypto, May Zabaneh, confirmed this development. The feature utilizes PayPal's payout infrastructure, ensuring that YouTube does not directly handle any crypto. This move signifies a growing trend in Big Tech, as platforms like YouTube adapt to the digital currency landscape.

data.title: Do Kwon has been sentenced to 15 years in prison for a $40 billion fraud involving Terra Luna, bringing closure to victims of the 2022 collapse.
data.description: The verdict delivers a sense of closure and justice for the numerous individuals affected by the downfall of Terra and its UST stablecoin in 2022.

data.title: Rutherford Energy Ventures partners with ORNL and DOE to commercialize fusion technology in new pilot program called FULCRA.
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Rutherford Energy Ventures (REV) and the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) have teamed up to launch a pioneering public-private partnership initiative aimed at fast-tracking the advancement of vital infrastructure and necessary technologies for the commercialization of fusion power. The pilot project will introduce FULCRA (Fusion Upscaled Leveraged Consortia for Rapid Acceleration), with Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) designated as the location for the initial trial program. This collaboration seeks to enhance the development of fusion energy and position the United States as a leader in this field.

data.title: Constellation wins Platts Global Energy Award for deal with Microsoft, a 20-year PPA in 2025.
data.description: In Baltimore, Constellation received the prestigious title of "Energy Deal of the Year" at the 2025 Platts Global Energy Awards. The recognition was for a remarkable 20-year power purchase agreement with tech giant Microsoft.

data.title: NFEC introduces National Life Skills Council & Certified Life Skills Instructor to boost life readiness, workforce outcomes.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Dallas, the National Financial Educators Council (NFEC) introduced the National Life Skills Council (NLSC) and its latest certification, the Certified Life Skills Instructor. The NFEC, accredited by IACET and a Certified B Corporation, is a reputable organization in the financial education sector. This initiative aims to enhance life skills education, with the new certification offering professional development for individuals in this field. This announcement marks a significant step in promoting life skills education, indicating a commitment to improving essential skills among individuals.
Zelensky expected in Berlin on Monday - reports

data.title: TVL is no longer a reliable DeFi metric. Smart investors now focus on USDT, USDC, and USDe stablecoin issuance which serves as a genuine signal in the crypto market. TVL was inflated by token prices and recursive loops, leading to false indicators. Incentives distort TVL.
data.description: Total Value Locked (TVL) has long been considered an indicator of DeFi's health - when it's high, the sector is deemed 'thriving,' and when it's low, DeFi is seen as 'in decline.' However, during 2025, this narrative began to shift as the crypto market changed rapidly. Now, smart investors and analysts are paying more attention to stablecoin issuance for USDT, USDC, and new programmatic dollars like USDe as a more reliable signal. This is because stablecoin supply growth is seen as a more genuine indicator of the market's health as it cannot be faked. TVL has become inflated by token prices and is not as accurate as it once was. The figure is distorted by factors like liquid staking tokens, leverage spirals, and incentives, leading to a false representation of the underlying liquidity in DeFi. Essentially, stablecoin issuance is now considered a better metric for assessing the health of the crypto market compared to TVL.

data.title: Devonian Health Group reports first quarter results: $0.5M gross margin, $1.6M net loss, $6.6M cash on hand. Advances in Thykamine™ research and clinical trials.
data.description: Devonian Health Group Inc. is advancing preclinical studies for Thykamine™ in MASH and Fibrosis, enhancing understanding of its mechanism of action. A study published in Biomedicines highlights Thykamine™ as a new player in anti-inflammatory drugs. The company has completed the design for a Phase 2/3 clinical study in pediatric Atopic Dermatitis and is initiating a pivotal clinical study for radiodermatitis. First-quarter financial results show a gross margin of $0.5 million on distribution revenues, a net loss of $1.6 million, and gross proceeds of $2.7 million from private placements. Cash reserves as of October 31, 2025, were at $6.6 million, and the company remains debt-free. CEO Dr. Andre Boulet expresses satisfaction with the company's progress and highlights the promising future prospects for Thykamine™. The protocol for the Pediatric AD clinical study has been finalized, and the pivotal clinical study for radiodermatitis is in preparation. Preclinical studies are ongoing to explore Thykamine™'s full potential.

data.title: Acclinate's NOWINCLUDED wins Bronze at 5th Annual Anthem Awards for digital health innovation.
data.description: Today, Acclinate, based in Birmingham, Alabama, revealed that their community platform, NOWINCLUDED, has won the Bronze Award in Health: Digital & Innovative Experiences at the 5th Annual Anthem Awards. The platform was acknowledged for its creativity and impact on health, marking a significant achievement for the company.

data.title: STS Travel hosting month-long Bahamas Spring Break 2026 Beach Bash from March 2-27, 2026 with 4- and 5-night all-inclusive packages.
data.description: An electrifying event, the Bahamas Spring Break 2026 Beach Bash hosted by STS Travel will take place from March 2 to March 27, 2026, in Annapolis, Md. The month-long blowout offers adrenaline-pumping 4- and 5-night all-inclusive packages.

data.title: Elevest Capital partners with Rise48 Equity to close Fund 62, acquiring 263-unit multifamily community in North Carolina.
data.description: A real estate investment firm, Elevest Capital, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, completed the successful closing of Fund 62 in collaboration with Rise48 Equity. This partnership facilitated the acquisition of two multifamily properties. Elevest Capital focuses on investing in multifamily assets. The firm operates privately and is known for its expertise in the real estate sector. The details were finalized on December 12, 2025.

data.title: Revolutionary POGMENT Biomimetic Collagen breakthrough at LivingPhoenix Forum conference in Chengdu, China hailed as transformative moment for extracellular matrix research.
data.description: LivingPhoenix Regenerative Technologies recently held its 12th conference presentation in CHENGDU, China, on Dec. 12, 2025. The event garnered praise from academicians, who dubbed it the "iPhone Moment for Extracellular Matrix Research." The conference was attended by a large number of international and domestic academicians, highlighting its significance in the field. This development marks a significant milestone for LivingPhoenix, showcasing their impact on the industry.

data.title: ETH surged 260% last similar event. Experts predict $5K reachable in 2026 based on realized price analysis.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a significant rally for Ethereum, as a buying opportunity emerged from the cryptocurrency's realized price. There is speculation that Ethereum could potentially reach $5,000 by 2026.

data.title: Dream Vacations named 2025 Power Partner of the Year by Special Needs Group, certifying numerous SNG Certified Accessible Travel Advocates.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 12, 2025, Special Needs Group® / Special Needs at Sea® has honored Dream Vacations as the 2025 Power Partner of the Year for their dedication in certifying a large number of SNG Certified Accessible Travel Advocates (CATA®). This acknowledgment highlights Dream Vacations' efforts in supporting accessible travel, showcasing their commitment in empowering individuals with special needs.

data.title: SYNEVIT® expands to West Coast with placement in Harvest Natural Foods, Atascadero, CA. Brick-and-mortar expansion in the US.
data.description: A popular Macedonian nutraceutical brand is further expanding its physical presence in the United States by entering the market in Atascadero, California. SYNEVIT® products are now being sold at Harvest Natural Foods in the area. This move marks a significant milestone for the brand as it continues to grow in the US market. The expansion was announced on December 12, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. This development demonstrates the brand's commitment to reaching a wider audience and making its products more accessible.
